query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS compliance_verifications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  quote_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  standard_id INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('compliant', 'non_compliant', 'requires_review', 'not_applicable') NOT NULL,
  confidence_score DECIMAL(5,2),
  findings JSON,
  recommendations JSON,
  verified_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  verified_by VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'AI',
  FOREIGN KEY (standard_id) REFERENCES australian_standards(id),
  INDEX idx_quote_id (quote_id),
  INDEX idx_standard_id (standard_id),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
